# minio_s3_bucket_policy (Data Source)

Reads the bucket policy document for an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_policy" "my_bucket" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}

output "policy_json" {
  value = data.minio_s3_bucket_policy.my_bucket.policy
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policy` (String)
